client_context.engagement_label: Northstar Enterprise customer support value engagement

ai_fluency_summary.basis: Aggregate AI Fluency baseline by function with small cohorts suppressed.

vbd_summary.summary: Velocity, Breadth, and Depth are the aggregate operating map for this workflow slice; they guide intervention planning and do not prove business impact.

outcome_evidence_status.statement: Customer-owned aggregate outcome evidence was accepted by the customer reviewer for the matching workflow slice and windows.

evidence_quality.rationale: Accepted aggregate outcome evidence and exact baseline/comparison windows exist, but volume and staffing assumptions remain caveated or missing.

allowed_phrases: Customer-owned outcome evidence supports a caveated value investigation for this workflow slice.
Open customer-owned assumptions still need owner review before stronger value language.
The next step is to resolve the open assumptions and retest on the same workflow slice.
required_caveats: This does not prove ROI or causality.
All evidence is aggregate-only and workflow-sliced; no person-level data crosses into FluencyTracr.
Customer-owned outcome data owns the value test; VBD and AI Fluency guide intervention planning only.

scenario_posture.posture_statement: Plan with the conservative band until outcome evidence is accepted and customer assumptions are resolved.

sponsor_decision.decision_basis: Caveated evidence supports continued investigation; resolve the volume and staffing assumptions before stronger value language.

intervention_retest.next_action: Resolve the staffing and volume assumptions with customer owners, run targeted workflow enablement, and retest.
intervention_retest.retest_measurement_plan: Recheck aggregate AI Fluency, VBD movement, and the selected outcome metric on the same workflow slice and windows.
